title: Jedi Monument (disambiguation)
content:
*[[Jedi Monument (New Holstice)]], was a monument that commemorated each Jedi that had died since the birth of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] using [[Memory moth/Legends|Memory moths]].
*[[Jedi monument (Ohma-D'un)]], was a bubble building that was constructed to immortalize the efforts [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] put into colonizing [[New Otoh Gunga]].
*[[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)]], was an ancient Jedi temple in which [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] was buried.

{{Disambig}}
